ksa_text: Knowledge of data validation techniques and methods for embedding quality checks into pipeline execution, including schema validation, data contract enforcement, freshness checks, volume anomaly detection, referential integrity verification, and appropriate failure handling and alerting.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies and procedures are in place to address AI risks and benefits arising from third-party software and data and other supply chain issues.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies and procedures are in place to address AI risks and benefits arising from third-party software and data and other supply chain issues.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Data Quality falls outside the primary competency scope of the GenAI CoE Leader. This knowledge KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Data Quality truly out-of-scope for the GenAI CoE Leader? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Data Quality as a core or recommended competency for the GenAI CoE Leader. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Data Quality falls outside the established competency profile for the GenAI CoE Leader. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Data Quality is outside the competency scope of the GenAI CoE Leader. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
